MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-08-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS GRAND PACIFIC HOTEL, QUOCK MIN WONG'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED WITH FINAL LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO CLEARLY LABEL EACH CAUSE OF ACTION ASSERTED; INDICATE WHICH DEFENDANT A PARTICULAR CAUSE OF ACTION IS ALLEGED AGAINST; AND TO ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION, INCLUDING DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF SHOULD ALSO INDICATE THE RELIEF SOUGHT AS TO EACH CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATIONS SHALL BE MADE IN CLEAR AND CONCISE LANGUAGE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2017 Continued To Nov-01-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Aug-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Eichhorn (415-982-0539) Plaintiff/Opposing party, in pro per.
Lori B. Feldman, Esq. (415-492-2120) for Defendants/Moving party GRAND PACIFIC HOTEL, QUOCK WONG.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS GRAND PACIFIC HOTEL, QUOCK WONG'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is
GRANTED without leave to amend. Based on the moving papers and plaintiff's unauthorized 25 page single-spaced opposition, the second amended complaint is unintelligible without facts to support each element of each cause of action, including damages and breach of duty. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2017 Continued To Aug-30-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Jun-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS GRAND PACIFIC HOTEL, QUOCK MIN WONG'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to clearly label each cause of action asserted; indicate which Defendant a particular cause of action is alleged against; and to allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action, including damages. Plaintiff should also indicate the relief sought as to each cause of action. Plaintiff's allegations shall be made in clear and concise language. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Continued To Jun-08-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Eichhorn (415-982-0589) Plaintiff/opposing party, in Pro Per.
No other appearances.

No Compliance with Tentative Ruling Rule. Court announced tentative ruling rule; does not hear from plaintiff. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs GRAND PACIFIC HOTEL and MR. WONG's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to June 8, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies to be delivered to department 501 no later than May 19, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2017 Continued To Jun-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2017 Continued To May-03-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Eichhorn (415-982-0589) Plaintiff/ opposing party in pro per.
Lori B. Feldman (415-492-2120) for Defendant/Moving party Grand Pacific Hotel. *Arrives late, 9:42am.

Hearing is held. The Court announces the review of the Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings and makes inquiries re: negligence and causes of action. Argued re: sufficient facts, law, and damages. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT GRAND PACIFIC HOTEL's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is taken under submission. Defense counsel to submit an order granting the motion and include with/without leave to amend. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
